package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gin_context_passed_beyond_request_boundary: Code that passes `*gin.Context` into goroutines, repositories, or long-lived service objects instead of extracting `context.Context` and request values.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule038NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule038NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule038NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario038Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule038NegativeService, input Rule038NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
